description: Update setup so it installs into the bootstrapped repo, tracks installed skills, and supports safe upgrade previews.

tasks.title: Install into the target repo
tasks.description: As a user, I want setup to copy skills from the harness clone into the repo I am bootstrapping so that running setup from another folder installs files in the right place.
acceptanceCriteria: Setup derives the source skills directory from the harness script location.
Setup derives the install destination from the current working directory by default.
Setup asks for confirmation before installing into the current working directory.
Existing unmanaged skill directories are not overwritten automatically.

tasks.title: Track managed installs for upgrades
tasks.description: As a user, I want setup to record what it installed so that future upgrades can safely update only harness-managed skill directories.
acceptanceCriteria: Setup writes install metadata into the target repo under .agents/.
Metadata records the harness source location, source commit when available, and installed skill manifests.
Overwrite mode updates only managed skill directories or missing targets.
Managed directories with local changes are detectable from the stored manifest.
Managed skills removed from the harness can be safely removed during upgrades when the target copy is unchanged.

tasks.title: Preview upgrades and document the workflow
tasks.description: As a user, I want a dry-run view of install and upgrade actions plus updated docs so that I can understand what setup will change before applying it.
acceptanceCriteria: Setup supports a dry mode that reports installs, upgrades, removals, skips, and up-to-date skills without modifying files.
README documents the correct bootstrap command and current-directory install behavior.
README documents how dry mode and overwrite mode are used for upgrades.
